BOREALISCARDS2-BERSERKER.description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, play 1 random card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-BERSERKER.title: Berserker
BOREALISCARDS2-BLOODY_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP.
BOREALISCARDS2-BLOODY_STRIKE.title: Impale
BOREALISCARDS2-TOWER_SHIELD.title: Tower Shield
BOREALISCARDS2-BLAZING_STRIKE.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
All Attacks drawn this way cost {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less until played.
BOREALISCARDS2-BLAZING_STRIKE.title: Blazing Strike
BOREALISCARDS2-SPARKS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-SPARKS.title: Sparks
BOREALISCARDS2-HEAT_CRASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove [gold]Artifact[/gold] from ALL enemies.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
BOREALISCARDS2-HEAT_CRASH.title: Heat Crash
BOREALISCARDS2-SMOLDER.description:
Apply {Initial:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card. If you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] an Attack, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-SMOLDER.title: Smolder
BOREALISCARDS2-HEARTH.title: Hearth
BOREALISCARDS2-DETERMINED.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-DETERMINED.title: Determined
BOREALISCARDS2-TERRORIZE.title: Terrorize
BOREALISCARDS2-RUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of the next {RushPower:plural:turn|{:diff()} turns}, lose 1 HP and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-RUSH.title: Rush
BOREALISCARDS2-FAN_THE_FLAMES.descriptio: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {FanTheFlamesPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies at the end of your turn.
BOREALISCARDS2-FAN_THE_FLAMES.title: Fan the Flames
BOREALISCARDS2-OVERPOWER.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Enemy loses {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
BOREALISCARDS2-OVERPOWER.title: Overpower
BOREALISCARDS2-UNDYING_SPEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], raise your Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
BOREALISCARDS2-UNDYING_SPEAR.title: Undying Spear
BOREALISCARDS2-ROARING_FLAMES.descriptio: Whenever an Attack is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], play {Power:diff()} random {Power:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] and return {Power:plural:it|them} to the [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-ROARING_FLAMES.title: Roaring Flames
BOREALISCARDS2-TOXICOLOGY.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-BEJEWELED_BLADE.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-SATCHEL.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-MISDIRECTION.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-VANISH.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-ROPE_DART.title: Toxicology
BOREALISCARDS2-GLASSBLOWER.description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Glass[/gold].
Every {Cards:diff()} 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} you play, put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-GLASSBLOWER.title: Glassblowing
BOREALISCARDS2-HYPERSPEED_STRIKE.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-HYPERSPEED_STRIKE.title: Hyperspeed Strike
BOREALISCARDS2-POWER_UP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold] for that turn.
BOREALISCARDS2-POWER_UP.title: Power Up
BOREALISCARDS2-RIPSAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-RIPSAW.title: Ripsaw
BOREALISCARDS2-ERR.description: Whenever you draw this card, play {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:Power|Powers}.
BOREALISCARDS2-ERR.title: ERR://23¤Y%/
BOREALISCARDS2-NUCLEAR.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Plasma[/gold].
}At the start of the next {NuclearPower:plural:turn|{:diff()} turns}, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Plasma[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-NUCLEAR.title: Nuclear
BOREALISCARDS2-SHOCK_AND_AWE.title: Shock and Awe
BOREALISCARDS2-HIGH_VOLTAGE.title: High Voltage
BOREALISCARDS2-STACK_TRACE.description:
Gain 1 Orb Slot.
 Add a {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Dazed[/gold]|[gold]Void[/gold]} into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-STACK_TRACE.title: Stack Trace
BOREALISCARDS2-TEMPERATURE_SHOCK.title: Temperature Shock
BOREALISCARDS2-ALPHA_TESTING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Trigger the passive abilities of all your Orbs{IfUpgraded:show: twice}.
BOREALISCARDS2-ALPHA_TESTING.title: Alpha Testing
BOREALISCARDS2-LIQUID_COOLING.descriptio: Whenever you [gold]Channel[/gold] an [gold]Frost[/gold], gain {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold] that turn.
BOREALISCARDS2-LIQUID_COOLING.title: Liquid Cooling
BOREALISCARDS2-COLLECT.description:
Put a 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
BOREALISCARDS2-COLLECT.selectionScreenPr: Select a card to put in your Hand.
BOREALISCARDS2-COLLECT.title: Collect
BOREALISCARDS2-IONIZE.description: The first time you [gold]Channel[/gold] [gold]Lightning[/gold] each turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Lightning[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-IONIZE.title: Ionize
BOREALISCARDS2-METALLURGY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Status, increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} and put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
BOREALISCARDS2-METALLURGY.title: Metallurgy
